title: Role Models
questions: What is a role model? What makes someone a role model? What characteristics do role models possess?
Who are some famous role models? Ex. Jesus, Ghandi, Confucious What do they have in common? What are they most famous for doing? What type of people follow each role model?
Who is your role model? Describe this person in three sentences. Have your role models changed over the years?
Who are some role models for: Children? Teens? Adults? Seniors?
What is the difference between a good and bad role model? What are some of the good role models? Who are the bad role models?
